Title: Test suite - container/tray/serial procs (open/3 close methods/add/mint)
Description: Container open; ByCount/ByWeight/ByVision tray close + per-tray ConsumptionEvent; serial add; MESI mint. INSERT-EXEC temp-table pattern

Title: Test suite - Container_Complete + AIM claim + ShippingLabel + BOM check + MIP + auto-finish
Description: Phase-6 gate. Complete atomicity + AIM claim + ShippingLabel PrintedAt=NULL; BOM material check pass/fail + override; MIP proc-layer; auto-finish + WorkOrderCompletionConfirmed (FDS-06-028). ~100-135 assertions across both files

Title: CREATE 0026_arc2_phase7 - HoldEvent + AimShipperIdPool + AimPoolConfig + ContainerSerialHistory
Description: XDEP: Phase 1, Phase 2, Phase 6. CREATE Quality.HoldEvent (C-4, no longer Phase 1). AimShipperIdPool+AimPoolConfig must ship BEFORE Phase 6 Container_Complete claims - keep CREATE callable early. ContainerSerialHistory = UJ-05 update-in-place serial migration audit; structure for void-and-recreate swap. Open-event invariant via filtered unique index

Title: Seed Quality.HoldTypeCode rows
Description: CustomerComplaint, QualityIssue, EngineeringHold, ProductionHold, ContainerHold. ASCII-only. Code-table FK for HoldEvent.HoldTypeId

Title: Seed Lots.AimPoolConfig single row (S-11 defaults)
Description: TargetBuffer=50, Topup=30, Warn=20, Crit=10. Tuned later via AimPoolConfig admin view

Title: Seed Audit.LogEntityType (4) + LogEventType (10) rows
Description: LogEventType: HoldPlaced, HoldReleased, AimShipperIdClaimed, AimShipperIdToppedUp, AimPoolWarningAlarmFired, AimPoolCriticalAlarmFired, ContainerSerialMigrated, ShippingLabelVoided, ContainerShipped, PrintFailureSafetySweepRecovered

Title: Quality.Hold_Place + Hold_Release
Description: Open-event invariant: reject Place when open HoldEvent exists for Lot/Container. Bulk hold FDS-08-006. Container hold FDS-07-015/016 dispatches AIM PlaceOnHold/ReleaseFromHold via AimHoldHandler. Status-row. Audit HoldPlaced/HoldReleased

Title: Quality.Hold_GetOpenByLot + Hold_GetOpenByContainer
Description: No OUTPUT; empty set = no open hold. Resolved-name FK sub-objects

Title: Lots.Container_Ship
Description: Validate Complete + AIM-assigned + not-shipped + no open hold before ship. Audit ContainerShipped. Status-row

Title: Lots.ShippingLabel_Void + ShippingLabel_Reprint
Description: Reads/voids/reprints Lots.ShippingLabel (CREATEd in Phase 6 per C-5 - Phase 7 does NOT create it). Audit ShippingLabelVoided. Status-row

Title: Lots.SortCage_MigrateSerial + ContainerSerialHistory writeback
Description: UJ-05 update-in-place: write old->new serial pair to ContainerSerialHistory, void old shipping label, structure so void-and-recreate variant swaps without rebuild. Audit ContainerSerialMigrated. Status-row

Title: Lots.AimShipperIdPool_Claim + AimShipperIdPool_Topup
Description: Claim = FIFO with READPAST; hard-fail on empty pool per FDS-07-010a (OI-33) - no silent fallback. Topup inserts fetched IDs, audit AimShipperIdToppedUp. Claim audits AimShipperIdClaimed. Status-row. Consumed by Phase 6 Container_Complete

Title: Lots.AimShipperIdPool_GetDepth + GetByContainer
Description: GetDepth -> available count for alarm monitor + wallboard. GetByContainer resolves claimed ID. No OUTPUT

Title: Lots.AimPoolConfig_Get + AimPoolConfig_Update
Description: Get returns single config row. Update is status-row mutation; audit via AimPoolConfig entity type

Title: Named Queries wrapping all Phase-7 procs
Description: Mutation procs need attributes.type=Query (status-row JDBC). Run scan.ps1 after

Title: AimPoolTopup gateway timer (30s AIM GetNextNumber)
Description: 30s timer. Fetch AIM shipper IDs via HTTP/SOAP GetNextNumber when depth < TargetBuffer, call Topup. Log to Audit.InterfaceLog. Honors AimPoolConfig thresholds. B17 async

Title: AimPoolAlarmMonitor gateway timer (60s warn/crit/exhausted)
Description: 60s timer. GetDepth vs Warn/Crit; fire Warning/Critical/exhausted alarms. Audit alarm-fired events

Title: AimHoldHandler message handler (AIM PlaceOnHold/ReleaseFromHold)
Description: Dispatched by Hold_Place/Release for container holds (FDS-07-015/016). AIM PlaceOnHold/ReleaseFromHold; log Audit.InterfaceLog. FDS-01-014 async

Title: AimUpdateHandler message handler (AIM UpdateAim re-sort)
Description: Sort-cage re-sort serial migration (UJ-05). AIM UpdateAim to remap shipper assignment after serial replacement. Log Audit.InterfaceLog

Title: PrintFailureSafetySweep gateway timer (5-min orphan recovery)
Description: 5-min timer. Recover orphaned print failures; alarm when >5 stranded. Audit PrintFailureSafetySweepRecovered (FDS-07-006b)

Title: PrintFailureBroadcaster gateway timer (5s per-terminal banner)
Description: 5s timer. Broadcast per-terminal print-failure banner via session-filter (FDS-07-006b). Feeds Print Failure Banner. XDEP: Phase 6 print-failure source

Title: Hold Management top-level view
Description: Active-hold + container-hold lists, place/release, bulk hold (FDS-08-006), row-click nav to LOT Detail. onSelectionChange. XDEP: Phase 6 LOT Detail nav target (actually Phase 2)

Title: Sort Cage Workflow top-level view
Description: Unpack->inspect->re-pack; serial replacement via SortCage_MigrateSerial; print new LTT + shipping labels; void old; trigger AimUpdateHandler. Multi-step state machine in view.custom

Title: Shipping Dock top-level view
Description: Scan shipping label -> validate via Container_Ship preconditions -> confirm ship. Scan-driven

Title: AIM Pool Configuration admin view (S-11 tuning)
Description: Admin-only edit of AimPoolConfig single row via Config_Get/Update. editDraft/selected + dirty + ConfirmUnsaved. Pre-shape editDraft with every bound field

Title: AIM Pool Wallboard Tile embedded component
Description: Cross-cutting tile: pool depth via GetDepth, warn/crit color states vs config thresholds

Title: Print Failure Banner (reused from Phase 6)
Description: Wire Phase-6 Print Failure Banner to PrintFailureBroadcaster session-filtered messages

Title: Phase 7 SQL test suite
Description: Phase-7 gate. ~90-120 assertions. Hold place/release/bulk + open-event invariant, container ship validation, label void/reprint, sort-cage migration + history, AIM pool claim FIFO READPAST + hard-fail-empty (FDS-07-010a), topup, depth/alarms, config CRUD

Title: 0027_arc2_phase8_downtime_shift.sql - CREATE Oee.DowntimeEvent + LogEventType seeds
Description: CORRECTED number 0026 (not 0021). XDEP: Phase 1. Per C-4 Phase 8 OWNS the CREATE of Oee.DowntimeEvent (does not exist yet). One-open-per-machine invariant via filtered unique index WHERE EndedAt IS NULL. Nullable ReasonCodeId for late binding. Seed LogEventType: DowntimeStarted/DowntimeEnded/DowntimeReasonAssigned/EndOfShiftSubmitted/ShiftHandoverAcknowledged. Oee.Shift exists from Arc-1 0009 - NO Shift CREATE

Title: Oee.DowntimeEvent_Start + DowntimeEvent_End
Description: Start: nullable reason, enforces open-event invariant (refuse second open). End: closes open event, computes duration. Status-row procs -> NQ type=Query

Title: Oee.DowntimeReasonCode_Assign (late-binding no-overwrite)
Description: FDS-09-005 late-binding to existing (possibly closed) DowntimeEvent. Refuses overwrite of assigned reason. Audit DowntimeReasonAssigned

Title: Oee.EndOfShiftEntry_Submit (single-submission)
Description: FDS-09-013 single submit per shift (refuse second). Toggle-per-break; durations from shift schedule (Oee.Shift). Writes DowntimeEvent rows. Audit EndOfShiftSubmitted

Title: Oee.Shift_GetEndOfShiftSummary (handover read)
Description: FDS-09-015: open downtime, active pauses, in-process LOTs at shift end. No OUTPUT. Shift_End leaves open events open per UJ-10 Option D / OI-03

Title: Invoke S-02 downtime reason code bulk-load (353-row CSV)
Description: Bulk-load proc shipped Arc-1; invoke once Area mapping locks. Source reference/seed_data downtime_reason_codes. XDEP: Area->ReasonType mapping (FDS-09-005). ASCII byte-scan before apply

Title: Phase-8 Named Query wrappers
Description: Wraps DowntimeEvent_Start/End, ReasonCode_Assign, EndOfShiftEntry_Submit, Shift_GetEndOfShiftSummary + reason-code list filtered by Area+ReasonType. Mutation procs -> attributes.type=Query. Run scan.ps1

Title: DowntimePlcWatcher (per-machine PLC stop/run edge)
Description: TOPServer OPC stop/run edges. Stop edge -> DowntimeEvent_Start (NULL reason); run edge -> DowntimeEvent_End. Edge-detect/debounce; log Audit.InterfaceLog. S-04 OPC tags

Title: EndOfShiftWindowTrigger (Perspective view-side timer)
Description: View-side timer opens/prompts End-of-Shift entry within shift-end window from Oee.Shift schedule

Title: Downtime Entry view (manual)
Description: Machine auto-pop from station context. Reason dropdown filtered by Area + ReasonType (FDS-09-005). Start/End + late reason assign. Pre-declare bound custom props

Title: End-of-Shift Time Entry view (toggle-per-break)
Description: FDS-09-013 single-submission UI. One toggle per break; durations from schedule. Submit -> EndOfShiftEntry_Submit. Lock after submit. ConfirmUnsaved on close if dirty

Title: Shift-end Summary view (read-only handover)
Description: FDS-09-015: open downtime, active pauses, in-process LOTs from Shift_GetEndOfShiftSummary. Acknowledge -> Audit ShiftHandoverAcknowledged

Title: Supervisor Dashboard view (5 tiles)
Description: Tiles: DowntimeOpenSummary, PausedLotsSummary, ShiftAvailabilityTile, AimPoolWallboardTile, PrintFailureStrandedTile. Each bound to its read NQ. Pre-declare every bound custom prop

Title: Phase-8 SQL test suite
Description: Phase-8 gate. ~60-80 assertions: downtime start/end + open-event invariant, reason late-assign + no-overwrite, end-of-shift single submit (+ second-submit refusal), shift-end summary, reason filtering Area+ReasonType, shift availability derivation, Shift_End leaves open events open (UJ-10 Option D)

Title: CREATE Quality.QualitySample + QualityResult + QualityAttachment (migration 0028)
Description: IN-SCOPE (confirmed 2026-06-08, G-1): inspection recording FDS-08-011/012/013. Runtime-captured tables specified in Data Model section 5. CREATE QualitySample (LotId, QualitySpecVersionId, InspectionResultCodeId, SampledByUserId, SampledAt), QualityResult (per-attribute MeasuredValue/NumericValue/IsPass), QualityAttachment (file metadata). XDEP: Phase 1 (Lot) + Arc-1 QualitySpec tables.

Title: Inspection recording procs (Sample_Record + GetByLot + Result writers + attachment metadata)
Description: QualitySample_Record (header + per-attribute results + overall pass/fail + log), QualitySample_GetByLot, attachment metadata writer. Failed inspection = alert only, no auto-hold (FDS-08-012). Status-row pattern

Title: Wrap inspection procs as Named Queries
Description: Mutation procs -> attributes.type=Query

Title: Inspection Entry view
Description: Sample against published spec; per-attribute result grid; overall pass/fail; file attach (CSV/XLSX/PDF/PNG/JPG to filesystem + metadata). Pre-declare bound custom props

Title: Inspection History read view
Description: Read sample/result history per LOT; attachment download

Title: Inspection recording test suite
Description: Sample record, per-attribute results, pass/fail rollup, no-auto-hold. INSERT-EXEC temp-table

Title: Global Trace resolve + full-trace procs
Description: IN-SCOPE (2026-06-08, G-3a Global Trace): FDS-12-012/013/014 Global Trace Tool is MVP; plan deferred to unscoped workstream. GlobalTrace_Resolve (LOT/Serial/Container/Shipper input -> entity, disambiguation) + GlobalTrace_GetFullTrace (header + genealogy tree + production + movement + holds + shipping). Reads existing event tables - NOT gated on UJ-19. XDEP: Phase 7 gate

Title: Wrap Global Trace procs as Named Queries
Global Trace Tool view (Track home tile)
Description: Any-context read-only trace surface: input resolution + scan, header, genealogy tree, production, movement, holds, shipping, Print/Export. Primary Honda traceability deliverable (FDS-12-001/012/013/014)

Title: Global Trace test suite
Description: Resolve disambiguation + full-trace assembly across event tables

Title: CRT: seed audit event types (Lot.CrtActive shipped in Phase 1)
Description: IN-SCOPE (2026-06-08, G-2). Lot.CrtActive BIT added to the Phase 1 Lot CREATE (Data Model v1.9q). This task seeds the CRT Audit.LogEventType rows (CrtActivated, CrtCleared, MissedCrtInspect) in the Phase 9 migration.

Title: CRT workflow procs + UI (200% inspect, missed-inspect re-run, release)
Description: IN-SCOPE (2026-06-08, G-2). Lot_SetCrt/Lot_ClearCrt (supervisor-elevated) + Crt_GetRequiredInspections 200% gate + missed-inspect detection consumed by production procs + supervisor-AD-elevated clearance. Spans Phase 6 (assembly inspect) + Phase 7 (release). Builds on the QualitySample inspection stream (T172).

Title: Reporting workstream - PD-replacement operational reports (DEFERRED)
Description: DEFERRED to near/post-deployment per 2026-06-08 decision. Die Shot/Rejects/Downtime/Production reports + Shipping History via Ignition Reporting module over ProductionEvent/RejectEvent/DowntimeEvent/Shift. Gated on UJ-19 (MPP names the 4 PD reports + data sources). NOT the Global Trace Tool - that is in-scope (T178-T181).
